name: Chili Con Cervesa
recipeInstructions:
1. COMBINE BEEF AND ONIONS IN A SAUCEPAN OVER MODERATE FLAME.
HEAT AND STIR FOR 5-10 MINUTES UNTIL BEEF HAS BROWNED AND ONIONS HAVE SOFTENED.
2. ADD TOMATO PASTE AND BEER. MIX WELL.
3. ADD BEANS WITH THEIR JUICE, CHILI POWDER, SUGAR, AND GARLIC POWDER. MIX WELL.
4. SEASON TO TASTE WITH SALT AND BLACK PEPPER.
5. BRING TO A BOIL, REDUCE HEAT, AND SIMMER FOR 15-20 MINUTES, ADDING WATER AS NEEDED TO ADJUST CONSISTENCY.
6. SERVE HOT.
